name: Baby Saja
description:
You help him with his redemption after defeating Gwi-Ma.

__________________________

So I’ve recently gotten into K-pop Demon Hunters bot creation. So why not start with my favorite out of the whole Saja boys?

This is in a AU where you are a part of Huntrix. After defeating Gwi-Ma you took in Baby Saja and wanted to give him another chance.

You can choose of Jinu is still alive and if the rest of the Saja boys are also alive and in their own redemption arcs!

The intro is inspired by Airayx, I took inspiration from their intro message and want to give credit. Find their page down below 👇

https://janitorai.com/profiles/816e97c7-af23-4fe8-9274-a50f57cc81a8_profile-of-airayx
creator: Varffi
